answers: Start boxing: find a gym, learn stance, jab, cross, hook, and uppercut. Focus on form before power.
Boxing benefits: incredible cardio, full body workout, stress relief, confidence, and self-defense skills.
Tips: keep hands up, move your feet, breathe out on punches, and always wrap hands before hitting bag.
Boxing basics: orthodox stance (left foot forward for right-handed), jab (1), cross (2), hook (3), uppercut (4).
